title: Before/after closure evidence for #1680 completion-cost lane

retention.reason: retained evidence summarizes #1680 before/after and remaining-cost routing without replaying the full PR stack
retention.trust_rule: Use this record as the #1680 closeout-readiness input; it does not authorize parent closure by itself.
retention.rule: Retained closeout evidence preserves reportable closeout facts for lane-level continuation.

active_milestone.scope: Record compact before/after evidence and remaining-cost routing for #1680.

closure_check.remaining_open_cost_sources: #1697 workspace runtime editing; #1698 operator guidance; #1700-#1704 local checkpoint experiment; #1706 planning workflow friction
closure_check.why this decision is honest: Before/after evidence is now compact and checkable, but remaining child issues and cost sources are not fully reconciled and parent closure is not yet proven.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: scripts/check/check_completion_cost_lane_evidence.py reads this record and reports remaining blockers.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when child issue state or additional measurements change the parent closeout decision.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Before/after evidence must distinguish measured reductions from unresolved cost owners and child issue state.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Future #1680 closeout should use this compact record instead of replaying the full PR stack.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: When all remaining open cost sources are either fixed, intentionally out of scope, or routed to non-blocking follow-up owners.
